title: Recruitment
intro: Join our team of dedicated professionals. Prime College is always looking for talented individuals to help us deliver exceptional education.

openings.title: Business Management Tutor
openings.description: We are seeking an experienced Business Management tutor to deliver engaging and high-quality teaching across Level 4-7 qualifications.
responsibilities: Plan and deliver lessons across Business Management programmes (Level 4–7)
Assess and mark learner assignments, providing constructive feedback
Develop and update teaching materials and schemes of work
Support learners through one-to-one tutorials and academic guidance
Participate in internal and external quality assurance processes
Maintain accurate records of learner attendance, progress, and achievement
requirements: A degree in Business Management or a related discipline
A recognised teaching qualification (e.g. PGCE, DTLLS, or equivalent)
Minimum 2 years' experience teaching in further/higher education
Strong knowledge of OTHM and/or QUALIFI qualification frameworks
Ability to motivate and inspire adult learners
benefits: Central London location with excellent transport links

openings.title: Health & Social Care Assessor
openings.description: Join our Health & Social Care department to assess and support learners through their qualifications.
responsibilities: Conduct assessments of learner portfolios against qualification standards
Provide detailed written and verbal feedback to learners
Plan and carry out workplace observations where required
Maintain assessment records and ensure timely submission of results
Liaise with internal quality assurers to uphold standards
Attend standardisation meetings and team briefings
requirements: A relevant qualification in Health & Social Care (Level 5 or above)
Assessor qualification (e.g. CAVA, A1/D32/D33, or equivalent)
Proven experience in assessing vocational qualifications
Current knowledge of sector practices and regulations
benefits: Flexible working hours to suit your schedule
Access to CPD training and workshops

openings.title: Student Admissions Officer
openings.description: Manage student enquiries, applications, and enrolment processes to ensure a smooth admissions journey.
responsibilities: Handle incoming enquiries via phone, email, and in person
Guide prospective students through the application and enrolment process
Verify and process student documentation and eligibility checks
Maintain the student records database with accurate and up-to-date information
Coordinate with academic departments on course availability and intake dates
Prepare admissions reports for management review
requirements: Previous experience in an admissions or student services role
Strong IT skills including MS Office and CRM/database systems
Excellent customer service and communication skills
High attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to work under pressure during peak enrolment periods
A Level or equivalent qualification (degree desirable)
benefits: 20+ days annual leave plus bank holidays

meta.title: Recruitment – Prime College
meta.description: Explore career opportunities at Prime College. Join our team of education professionals.
